subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of holiness which have been sent down in truth from the cloud of wondrous grace, whereby the hearts of the servants are purified from defilement [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات القدس نزلت بالحق من سحاب فضل بدیعا و بها تطهر افئده العباد عن دنس
subcodes.subjects: @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @chastisement and requital, @idolatry, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
